name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#
Together we have done something unprecedented: More than 2.5 million contributions to our campaign totaling $73 million in the last year. [**Now take the next step and commit to talking to voters at a local volunteer event in your community.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b34/43f17890/466f597b/620ff2c9/3007368342/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=R&eventtype=CW&eventtype=O&eventtype=D&eventtype=CV&eventtype=B&eventtype=RV&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")
Dear Sisters and Brothers,
Today we are very proud to announce some extraordinary news: our supporters have made 2.5 million contributions to our campaign totaling $73 million, including $33 million in the last three months.
There were very few people in the world who would have believed you one year ago if you said that Bernie Sanders' supporters would raise $73 million by the end of the year for our presidential campaign. And yet here we are.
More important than how much money we've raised is _how_ we have raised these funds. Incredibly, the vast majority of all the money we have raised comes from small-dollar contributions. You won't see that from our opponent. I don't go around asking a handful of millionaires and billionaires for big checks and call it a day.
The truth is our campaign finance system is nothing short of a national disgrace. Elections should be determined by the power of good ideas, not who can hustle the most money from the rich and powerful.
**Real change comes when large numbers of Americans get involved in the democratic process.** We have shown that is possible in terms of competing financially against the interests of the billionaire class. And now it is time to show that we can organize in our communities too.
With the first people voting for our next president in less than a month, we have an obligation right now to do all we can to bring as many people into the democratic process as we can. **We have a real path toward victory if you can commit to talking to voters at local volunteer event in your community. Here's information for events happening near you:**
**[Phone Banking for Bernie:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vrwl)
Sunday, January 3rd in Frederick **
**[Carlyn Place Phone Bank w Daniel Adkins:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rh5y)
Monday, January 4th in Arlington **
**[Phone Banking in Rockville, MD:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vrb5)
Tuesday, January 5th in Rockville **
**[Calls for Bernie!:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rkkh)
Wednesday, January 6th in Baltimore **
**[Phone banking for Bernie:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vrs5)
Thursday, January 7th in Takoma Park **
****[ **[Phone bank party at Wayne's:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rhx3)
Saturday, January 9th in Gaithersburg ** Our supporters are organizing thousands more events in communities all across the country as well. You can [**find those here.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b34/43f17890/466f597b/620ff2c9/3007368342/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=R&eventtype=CW&eventtype=O&eventtype=D&eventtype=CV&eventtype=B&eventtype=RV&daterange=all-events&sort=distance") When we talk about a "political revolution," we are not just talking about tinkering around the edges of American society. We are talking about transforming our country in many respects -- the economy, health care, education, the environment, criminal justice, immigration and many other areas. Powered by more than 2.5 million contributions from 1 million people donating less than $30 a piece, we have shown that our political revolution should not be underestimated. I am excited to see what comes next. Thank you for all of your support. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders

Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b34/43f17890/466f597b/620ff2f6/3007368342/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b34/43f17890/466f597b/620ff2f7/3007368342/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b34/43f17890/466f597b/620ff2f4/3007368342/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b34/43f17890/466f597b/620ff2f5/3007368342/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Jeb Bush, Jr.
subject: RE: This is it
body:
Friend -- Dad put me in charge of jump-starting our 2016 Founding Membership program, and all eyes are on us.

We need to hit our goal of 10,000 Founding Members by Monday at midnight, and right now we are 4,674 members short.

**I need you to be one of them.[Please chip in just $1 within the next 33 hours to make sure you're amongst our 2016 Founding Members.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ibgkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrvdhzh_plcmmdvf.html)**

On Tuesday morning, I have to report back to Dad with an update, and I want your name included on the list I hand him, Friend.

**Let 's go win this thing. Become a 2016 Founding Member before Monday:**

[**Jeb2016.com/2016-Founding-Member/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ivckpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrvdhzv_plcmmdvf.html)

Thank you,

Jeb Jr.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qshqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcsfwhv_plcmmdvf.html)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: January 02, 2015
Subject: This is it**
This is it, Friend.

The 2016 election year is officially upon us, and Iowans vote in just 30 days. The fight to take back the White House starts right now with you.

**Because you were such an important member of our team in 2015, I need you again.

[ Please become one of the first 2016 Founding Members of this campaign by contributing just $1 right now.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hbhrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdbwqmc_plcmmdvf.html)**

**Our team calculated it, and we need 10,000 2016 Founding Members in order to fund our efforts over the next thirty days before Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/nfphgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbfpyjp_plcmmdvf.html)
When you become a 2016 Founding Member, your money will go directly to advertising, field operations, campaign materials and orchestrating the most ambitious Get-Out-The-Vote operation of all the campaigns.

More than that though, this is about knowing you have my back in the crucial days that lay ahead.

**Friend , if I can count on you, please contribute just $1 and become a 2016 Founding Member now:**

[**Jeb2016.com/2016-Founding-Member/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/adhzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcdpkst_plcmmdvf.html)

Because of you, we'll start 2016 prepared to win.

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/yqfryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwqglcc_plcmmdvf.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=7078&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Why we need to Audit the Fed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot, It is no secret that the Federal Reserve's unchecked printing press causes recessions and increases income inequality. Allowing the Fed to inflate our money supply will artificially keep interests rates low, but at what cost? **Their acts can no longer go unchecked, which is why I am proud to carry forth my father 's original 'Audit the Fed' legislation, which will receive a vote in the Senate in early January.** This is the moment we've been working for years for. [Will you help prove to my colleagues in the Senate that they should stand with me in voting to Audit the Fed next week?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655450:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r) | | **[Chip in $25 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655450:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r)**
---
**[Chip in $50 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655450:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r)**
**[Chip in $75 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655450:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r)**
**[Chip in $100 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655450:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r)**
**[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655450:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r)**
In 2009, Senator Cruz drafted a legal brief praising President Obama's American Recovery and Reinvestment Act, a stimulus bill that increased deficit spending by over $800 billion.

In the brief, Senator Cruz argued that the bill's handouts will "directly impact the economy" and "further the greater purpose of economic recovery for America."

Earlier this month, Cruz then blamed the Great Recession not on the Federal Reserve's artificial lowering of interest rates, but on its failure to continue pushing them down in a timely manner. Cruz said that the Federal Reserve's decision to "[shift] to a tighter monetary policy...set the stage for the financial crisis."

On the campaign trail, Senator Cruz has further demonstrated his unwillingness to rein in artificial credit expansion by repeatedly calling for the Fed to follow "rules-based" monetary policy. **This means that he still wants to control the money supply in order to meet the requirements of a mandate or equation.**

**I couldn 't disagree more strongly. No true fiscal conservative should ever support the artificial lowering of interest rates--not in 2008, not now, not ever. **

**Doing so is the equivalent of signing a death warrant for our country 's low income earners.**

The reason for this is simple: big banks, corporations, and government entities receive the Fed's newly-created money long before anyone else, and they bid up the prices of goods before the rest of us can get to purchasing them.

**As a result of the dovish Fed policies championed by legislators like Senator Cruz and President Obama, the middle class is rapidly shrinking.**

From 2009 to 2012, as the money stock increased by over 2 billion, the real incomes of the top 1 percent jumped by more than 30 percent. Over the past four and a half decades, as the money stock increased by over two-thousand percent, the share of adults in the highest-income households has more than doubled. Meanwhile, members of the lowest-income tier now account for one-fifth of the country.

**Not only has the Fed 's low interest rate policies widened the income gap, they have also resulted in fewer Americans working than at any time since the Jimmy Carter administration.** Labor force participation has declined to a measly 62.5 percent of the workforce.

As of November, 2015 was on track to have more layoffs than any other year since the Great Recession. Contrary to what Senator Cruz and President Obama would argue, we don't need to cut interest rates in order to escape recessions.

**We don 't need to choose between reducing income inequality and creating economic stability. Instead, we simply need to begin governing conservatively.**

When push comes to shove, we need to stop feeding the economy with the cheap money that the wealthy all-too-frequently begs for. Our economy will never significantly improve--and income inequality will never appreciably fall --until bureaucrats like Senator Cruz and President Obama begin to accept this point.

It's time to end the Fed.

Will you stand with me?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
**[>> DONATE NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32655451:WCLnbzyKN:m:1:879035888:0DE7E7CD8099180D4C0DDFF25F452B82:r)**
---

Paid for by Rand Paul for President
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWCLnbzyKN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWCLnbzyKN)

name: Peter Clerkin, Bernie 2016
subject: Reserve your spot: Official VA Bernie organizing meeting
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
Virginia has a huge role to play in electing Bernie to the White House in 2016. We're holding a series of events across Virginia this week to get as many volunteers mobilized in January as possible.
**Will you come to one of them? Please click the link for your area to RSVP:**
**[Thursday, January 7th @ 7pm - Arlington, VA](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffdb9/1207562357/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/training/4vr5f")**
[**Saturday, January 9th @ 11am - Richmond, VA**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda6/1207562357/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/training/4vrm7")
[**Saturday, January 9th @ 4pm- Norfolk, VA**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda7/1207562357/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/training/4vr5z")
[**Saturday, January 10th @11:30 am - Reston, VA**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda4/1207562357/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/training/4vvvv")
[**Saturday, January 10th @ 4:30pm - Charlottesville, VA**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda5/1207562357/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/training/4rhcw")
At the event in your community, you'll get an update directly from Bernie 2016 staff about campaign strategy, and what we need Virginia to do in January to help Bernie win this election.
January is the month when our work could mean the difference between winning or losing the crucial early primaries for Bernie. We need the momentum those early wins will give us to put Bernie in the best position possible to win in Virginia. Victories in Iowa, New Hampshire -- and then in Virginia -- are ours for the taking. But we have to do the work!
**That 's where you come in. Bernie has something no other candidate has: a nationwide volunteer army that's already talking to tens of thousands of voters on the phone and in person every week in Iowa, New Hampshire and the rest of the early states. We need to help Bernie win the early primaries and organize Virginia for our March 1 primary.**
Please sign up to your event at one of the links above.
Can't wait to meet you!
In solidarity,
Peter Clerkin
Virginia State Director
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda2/1207562357/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda3/1207562357/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda0/1207562357/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b3d/43f17890/46a262bc/620ffda1/1207562357/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
